text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists exactly as cited, published in *Nature Biotechnology* (2023) with DOI 10.1038/s41587-023-01763-2. The authors listed in the reference (Hie, Shanker, Xu, Bruun, Weidenbacher, Tang, Wu, Pak, Kim) match the real paper, with the only minor discrepancy being the omission of John Kuriyan, who does not appear in the actual author list. The title, venue, and URL are all confirmed.
LINK: https://www.nature.com/articles/s41587-023-01763-2
